intake.welcome: Welcome to the AI Hospital Intake Assistant. Please describe your symptoms and I'll help assess your situation. You can also upload a vitals video for a more comprehensive evaluation.
intake.title: AI Intake Assessment
intake.subtitle: Describe your symptoms for an AI-powered triage evaluation
intake.intakeChatDesc: Answer the AI's questions for an accurate assessment
intake.weAskUntil: We'll ask until we have location, severity, duration, and any other symptoms.
intake.healthProfileDesc: Optional. Helps the AI consider your history (e.g. past surgery) for safer triage. Saved locally.
intake.symptomImageDesc: Upload a photo (e.g. rash, swelling) so the AI can consider it when assessing.
intake.symptomImageSent: This image will be sent with your messages for context.
intake.symptomImageAdded: Symptom image added. It will be included when you send messages.
intake.imageUploadFailed: Image upload failed. Please try again.
intake.vitalsFromVideoDesc: Record a 20–30 second face video, then upload for AI vitals extraction
intake.yourInformationDesc: If anything is wrong, tell the agent in the chat so we can correct it.
intake.noInformationYet: Nothing recorded yet. Your answers will appear here.
intake.vitalsDetectedMock: Vitals detected (mock) — Heart Rate: {{hr}} bpm, Respiration: {{rr}} breaths/min
intake.vitalsDetected: Vitals detected — Heart Rate: {{hr}} bpm, Respiration: {{rr}} breaths/min
intake.assessmentCompleteTriage: Assessment complete. Based on the information you've provided, here is your triage result:
intake.assessmentCompleteDefault: Assessment complete. Here is your triage result:
intake.videoUploadFailed: Video upload failed. Please try again.
intake.couldNotProcessVitals: Could not process vitals from video. Using mock vitals.
intake.ttsQuotaExceeded: Voice is temporarily unavailable (quota exceeded). Please use text mode for now.

triage.reasonMild: Symptoms appear mild based on available information.
triage.reasonChestPain: Chest pain may indicate a cardiac emergency.
triage.reasonSevereAbdominal: Severe abdominal pain may indicate appendicitis or other acute conditions.
triage.reasonBreathing: Breathing difficulty may indicate respiratory distress.
triage.reasonSurgeryHigh: Patient reports significant symptoms and has relevant surgical history; possible complication or recurrence — recommend evaluation.
triage.reasonSurgeryMedium: Patient has relevant surgical/medical history; symptoms warrant evaluation.
triage.reasonMock: Patient reports moderate symptoms requiring clinical evaluation. Vitals within acceptable range.
triage.triageMessageMock: Urgency level MODERATE. Please proceed to General Medicine for evaluation.

footer.tagline: AI-powered emergency triage and vital sign analysis for faster, smarter healthcare decisions.
footer.builtWithCare: Built with care for better healthcare outcomes.

home.heroSubtext: Skip the paperwork. Describe your symptoms to our AI assistant, upload a quick video for vitals, and get an instant triage recommendation — all in under a minute.
home.featuresSubtext: Combining conversational AI with computer vision to deliver faster, more accurate emergency assessments.
home.howItWorksSubtext: Three simple steps to get your AI-powered triage recommendation.
home.feature1Desc: Our conversational AI gathers your symptoms and medical history through an intuitive chat interface — no forms to fill out.
home.feature2Desc: Upload a short face video and our computer vision model extracts heart rate and respiration — no wearables needed.
home.feature3Desc: Receive an AI-generated triage recommendation in seconds, with urgency level, department routing, and clinical reasoning.
home.feature4Desc: Your health data is encrypted end-to-end. We follow healthcare data privacy standards to keep your information safe.
home.step1Desc: Chat with our AI assistant about what you're experiencing. Answer a few follow-up questions for a thorough assessment.
home.step2Desc: Optionally record a 20-30 second face video. Our AI will extract your heart rate and respiration rate automatically.
home.step3Desc: Receive an instant triage recommendation including urgency, suggested department, and clinical reasoning.
home.ctaSubtext: Start your AI-powered health assessment now. No sign-up required — just describe your symptoms and get instant guidance.

about.title: About Lumina Health
about.subtitle: We're building the future of emergency triage — combining artificial intelligence with computer-vision vitals to deliver faster, smarter healthcare decisions.
about.missionText: To reduce wait times and improve outcomes by putting AI-powered triage in every patient's pocket.
about.visionText: A world where every emergency visit starts with an intelligent, empathetic assessment — so the right care reaches the right person at the right time.
about.ctaSubtext: Try our AI-powered intake assistant and see how fast intelligent triage can be.

profile.signInToView: Sign in to view your profile
profile.signInToViewDesc: Log in with Auth0 to see your profile and assessment history.
profile.authNotConfigured: Auth0 is not configured. Sign-in and profile are unavailable.
profile.healthProfileDesc: Used during intake so the AI can consider your history (e.g. eczema, medications). Save to store on your account.
profile.historyDesc: Your past triage assessments will appear here.
profile.historyPlaceholderHint: Complete an intake to see your history here.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.fillAllFields: Please fill in all fields before submitting.
contact.getBackToYou: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.name: Name
